    <!-- ES MODULE SCRIPT -->
    <script type="module">
        import * as THREE from 'three';
        import { OrbitControls } from 'three/addons/controls/OrbitControls.js';
        import { RoomEnvironment } from 'three/addons/environments/RoomEnvironment.js';
        import { Water } from 'three/addons/objects/Water.js';
        import { Sky } from 'three/addons/objects/Sky.js';
        import { GLTFLoader } from 'three/addons/loaders/GLTFLoader.js';
        import { DecalGeometry } from 'three/addons/geometries/DecalGeometry.js';
        import { FontLoader } from 'three/addons/loaders/FontLoader.js';
        import { TextGeometry } from 'three/addons/geometries/TextGeometry.js';

        lucide.createIcons();
        const globalClock = new THREE.Clock();
        const textureLoader = new THREE.TextureLoader();

        // Base theme colors
        let currAccentHex = 0xE5B769;
        let currTechHex = 0x00F0FF;
        let currBgHex = 0x020203;

        // Mobile detection
        const isMobile = /Mobi|Android|iPhone|iPad|iPod/i.test(navigator.userAgent) || window.innerWidth <= 768;

        /* ==========================================
           MOBILE MENU TOGGLE
        ========================================== */
        const menuToggle = document.getElementById('mobileMenuToggle');
        const menuOverlay = document.getElementById('mobileMenuOverlay');
        const menuClose = document.getElementById('mobileMenuClose');

        if (menuToggle && menuOverlay && menuClose) {
            menuToggle.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                menuOverlay.classList.add('open');
            });
            menuClose.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                e.stopPropagation();
                menuOverlay.classList.remove('open');
            });
            document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-menu-item, .mobile-start-btn, .mobile-theme-toggles button').forEach(el => {
                el.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    menuOverlay.classList.remove('open');
                });
            });
            document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
                if (menuOverlay.classList.contains('open') && !menuOverlay.contains(e.target) && !menuToggle.contains(e.target)) {
                    menuOverlay.classList.remove('open');
                }
            });
        }

        /* ==========================================
           CREEPY EYES JS ANIMATION
        ========================================== */
        document.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            const pupils = document.querySelectorAll('.creepy-pupil');
            pupils.forEach(pupil => {
                const rect = pupil.parentElement.getBoundingClientRect();
                const x = rect.left + rect.width / 2;
                const y = rect.top + rect.height / 2;
                const rad = Math.atan2(e.clientX - x, e.clientY - y);
                const dist = Math.min(rect.width / 4, Math.hypot(e.clientX - x, e.clientY - y) / 20);
                const moveX = Math.sin(rad) * dist;
                const moveY = Math.cos(rad) * dist;
                pupil.style.transform = `translate(calc(-50% + ${moveX}px), calc(-50% + ${moveY}px))`;
            });
        });

        /* ==========================================
           0. 1ST SECTION: 3D INTERACTIVE TEXT with Liquid Metallic Shine, Smaller Size, Auto-Rotate on Mobile
        ========================================== */
        const textCont = document.getElementById('text-canvas-container');
        const rendererText = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ alpha: true, antialias: true });
        rendererText.setPixelRatio(isMobile ? 1 : Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 1.5));
        rendererText.setSize(textCont.clientWidth, textCont.clientHeight);
        textCont.appendChild(rendererText.domElement);

        const cameraText = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(45, textCont.clientWidth / textCont.clientHeight, 1, 1500);
        if (isMobile) {
            cameraText.position.set(0, -20, 250);
        } else {
            cameraText.position.set(0, -40, 450);
        }
        const cameraTargetText = new THREE.Vector3(0, 0, 0);

        const sceneText = new THREE.Scene();
        
        const pmremGenerator = new THREE.PMREMGenerator(rendererText);
        const envMap = pmremGenerator.fromScene(new RoomEnvironment(), 0.04).texture;
        
        const ambientLightText = new THREE.AmbientLight(0x404060);
        sceneText.add(ambientLightText);
        const dirLight1T = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffeedd, 1.5);
        dirLight1T.position.set(1, 1, 1);
        sceneText.add(dirLight1T);
        const dirLight2T = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0x99ccff, 1.2);
        dirLight2T.position.set(-1, 0.5, -1);
        sceneText.add(dirLight2T);
        const pointLight1 = new THREE.PointLight(0xffaa00, 1, 20);
        pointLight1.position.set(2, 2, 5);
        sceneText.add(pointLight1);
        const pointLight2 = new THREE.PointLight(0x00aaff, 1, 20);
        pointLight2.position.set(-2, -1, 5);
        sceneText.add(pointLight2);

        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        canvas.width = 512;
        canvas.height = 512;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(256, 256, 0, 256, 256, 256);
        gradient.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        gradient.addColorStop(0.2, '#ffdd99');
        gradient.addColorStop(0.4, '#cc8844');
        gradient.addColorStop(0.6, '#aa6622');
        gradient.addColorStop(0.8, '#884411');
        gradient.addColorStop(1, '#442200');
        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 512, 512);
        for (let i = 0; i < 5000; i++) {
            ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255,255,255,${Math.random()*0.3})`;
            ctx.fillRect(Math.random()*512, Math.random()*512, 2, 2);
        }
        const metalTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
        metalTexture.wrapS = metalTexture.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
        metalTexture.repeat.set(2, 2);

        const material = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
            color: 0xffffff,
            map: metalTexture,
            emissive: 0x222222,
            emissiveIntensity: 0.3,
            shininess: 100,
            specular: 0x444444,
            envMap: envMap,
            envMapIntensity: 1.5,
            side: THREE.DoubleSide
        });

        const groupText = new THREE.Group();
        sceneText.add(groupText);

        const fontLoader = new FontLoader();
        fontLoader.load('https://threejs.org/examples/fonts/helvetiker_regular.typeface.json', function (font) {
            const size1 = isMobile ? 18 : 24;
            const geometry1 = new TextGeometry('SIDDHI AI', {
                font: font,
                size: size1,
                depth: 4,
                curveSegments: 12,
                bevelEnabled: true,
                bevelThickness: 0.5,
                bevelSize: 0.3,
                bevelOffset: 0,
                bevelSegments: 5
            });
            geometry1.computeBoundingBox();
            geometry1.center();

            const mesh1 = new THREE.Mesh(geometry1, material);
            mesh1.position.y = size1 * 0.6;
            groupText.add(mesh1);

            const size2 = isMobile ? 12 : 16;
            const geometry2 = new TextGeometry('AI POWERED WEB DEVELOPMENT', {
                font: font,
                size: size2,
                depth: 3,
                curveSegments: 12,
                bevelEnabled: true,
                bevelThickness: 0.4,
                bevelSize: 0.2,
                bevelOffset: 0,
                bevelSegments: 5
            });
            geometry2.computeBoundingBox();
            geometry2.center();

            const mesh2 = new THREE.Mesh(geometry2, material);
            mesh2.position.y = -size2 * 0.8;
            groupText.add(mesh2);

            const edges1 = new THREE.EdgesGeometry(geometry1);
            const line1 = new THREE.LineSegments(edges1, new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0xffaa44 }));
            line1.position.copy(mesh1.position);
            groupText.add(line1);

            const edges2 = new THREE.EdgesGeometry(geometry2);
            const line2 = new THREE.LineSegments(edges2, new THREE.LineBasicMaterial({ color: 0xffaa44 }));
            line2.position.copy(mesh2.position);
            groupText.add(line2);
        });

        // Rotation logic – only enable drag on non-mobile
        let textTargetRotation = 0, textTargetRotationOnPointerDown = 0;
        let textPointerX = 0, textPointerXOnPointerDown = 0;
        let windowHalfX = window.innerWidth / 2;
        let isDragging = false;
        let dragStartY = 0;

        if (!isMobile) {
            textCont.style.touchAction = 'none';
            textCont.addEventListener('pointerdown', (e) => {
                if (e.isPrimary === false) return;
                isDragging = true;
                dragStartY = e.clientY;
                textPointerXOnPointerDown = e.clientX - windowHalfX;
                textTargetRotationOnPointerDown = textTargetRotation;
            });

            document.addEventListener('pointermove', (e) => {
                if (!isDragging || e.isPrimary === false) return;
                const deltaX = e.clientX - (textPointerXOnPointerDown + windowHalfX);
                const deltaY = e.clientY - dragStartY;
                
                if (Math.abs(deltaX) > Math.abs(deltaY) && Math.abs(deltaX) > 5) {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    textPointerX = e.clientX - windowHalfX;
                    textTargetRotation = textTargetRotationOnPointerDown + (textPointerX - textPointerXOnPointerDown) * 0.02;
                }
            });

            document.addEventListener('pointerup', (e) => {
                if (e.isPrimary === false) return;
                isDragging = false;
            });
        }

        function updateTextScene(time) {
            if (isMobile) {
                groupText.rotation.y += 0.005; // auto-rotate
            } else {
                groupText.rotation.y += (textTargetRotation - groupText.rotation.y) * 0.05;
            }
            cameraText.lookAt(cameraTargetText);
            rendererText.render(sceneText, cameraText);
        }

        /* ==========================================
           1. MAIN BACKGROUND ENVIRONMENT (optimized for mobile)
        ========================================== */
        const canvasBg = document.getElementById('webgl-canvas');
        const rendererBg = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ canvas: canvasBg, antialias: true, alpha: true });
        rendererBg.setPixelRatio(isMobile ? 1 : Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 1.5));
        rendererBg.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight);
        rendererBg.toneMapping = THREE.ACESFilmicToneMapping;
        rendererBg.toneMappingExposure = 1.0;

        const sceneBg = new THREE.Scene();
        const pmremBg = new THREE.PMREMGenerator(rendererBg);
        const envTexBg = pmremBg.fromScene(new RoomEnvironment(), 0.04).texture;
        const cameraBg = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(45, window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight, 0.1, 10000);
        cameraBg.position.set(0, 5, 25);

        const controlsBg = new OrbitControls(cameraBg, rendererBg.domElement);
        controlsBg.enableDamping = true; controlsBg.dampingFactor = 0.05; controlsBg.enablePan = false; controlsBg.autoRotate = false; 
        controlsBg.autoRotateSpeed = 1.0;

        // Reduce geometry detail on mobile
        const knotGeo = new THREE.TorusKnotGeometry(4, 1.2, isMobile ? 64 : 128, isMobile ? 16 : 32);
        const knotMat = new THREE.MeshPhysicalMaterial({ color: currAccentHex, metalness: 1.0, roughness: 0.1, clearcoat: 1.0, envMap: envTexBg, envMapIntensity: 1.5 });
        const torusKnot = new THREE.Mesh(knotGeo, knotMat);
        sceneBg.add(torusKnot);

        // Reduce point lights on mobile
        const pointLightsMax = isMobile ? 8 : 60; 
        const lightingUniformsGroup = new THREE.UniformsGroup(); lightingUniformsGroup.setName('LightingData');
        const lightData = []; const lightColorsData = []; const lightCenters = [];

        for (let i = 0; i < pointLightsMax; i++) {
            const col = new THREE.Color(i % 2 === 0 ? currTechHex : currAccentHex).toArray();
            const x = Math.random() * 80 - 40; const z = Math.random() * 80 - 40;
            lightData.push(new THREE.Uniform(new THREE.Vector4(x, 1, z, 0)));
            lightColorsData.push(new THREE.Uniform(new THREE.Vector4(col[0], col[1], col[2], 0)));
            lightCenters.push({ x, z });
        }
        lightingUniformsGroup.add(lightData); lightingUniformsGroup.add(lightColorsData); lightingUniformsGroup.add(new THREE.Uniform(pointLightsMax));

        const cameraUniformsGroup = new THREE.UniformsGroup(); cameraUniformsGroup.setName('ViewData');
        cameraUniformsGroup.add(new THREE.Uniform(cameraBg.projectionMatrix)); cameraUniformsGroup.add(new THREE.Uniform(cameraBg.matrixWorldInverse));

        const rawMat = new THREE.RawShaderMaterial({
            uniforms: { modelMatrix: { value: null }, normalMatrix: { value: null } },
            name: 'CyberGrid', defines: { POINTLIGHTS_MAX: pointLightsMax },
            vertexShader: document.getElementById('vertexShader').textContent,
            fragmentShader: document.getElementById('fragmentShader').textContent,
            glslVersion: THREE.GLSL3
        });

        const plane = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.PlaneGeometry(150, 150), rawMat.clone());
        plane.material.uniformsGroups = [cameraUniformsGroup, lightingUniformsGroup];
        plane.material.uniforms.modelMatrix.value = plane.matrixWorld;
        plane.material.uniforms.normalMatrix.value = plane.normalMatrix;
        plane.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; plane.position.y = -10; sceneBg.add(plane);

        // Reduce grid spheres on mobile
        const gridSize = isMobile ? 2 : 8;
        const gridGroup = new THREE.Group();
        const sphereGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(1.5, isMobile ? 6 : 8, isMobile ? 6 : 8);
        for (let i = 0; i < gridSize; i++) { for (let k = 0; k < gridSize; k++) {
            const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(sphereGeo, rawMat.clone());
            mesh.material.uniformsGroups = [cameraUniformsGroup, lightingUniformsGroup];
            mesh.material.uniforms.modelMatrix.value = mesh.matrixWorld;
            mesh.material.uniforms.normalMatrix.value = mesh.normalMatrix;
            mesh.position.set(i * 10 - 40, -8, k * 10 - 40); gridGroup.add(mesh);
        }}
        sceneBg.add(gridGroup);

        const sun = new THREE.Vector3(); const waterY = -2000;
        const waterGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(10000, 10000);
        const waterNormals = textureLoader.load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/r160/examples/textures/waternormals.jpg', function (tex) { tex.wrapS = tex.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping; });
        const water = new Water(waterGeometry, { textureWidth: 512, textureHeight: 512, waterNormals: waterNormals, sunDirection: new THREE.Vector3(), sunColor: currAccentHex, waterColor: currBgHex, distortionScale: 3.7 });
        water.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2; water.position.y = waterY; sceneBg.add(water);

        const sky = new Sky(); sky.scale.setScalar(10000); sky.position.y = waterY; sceneBg.add(sky);
        const skyUniforms = sky.material.uniforms; skyUniforms['turbidity'].value = 10; skyUniforms['rayleigh'].value = 2; skyUniforms['mieCoefficient'].value = 0.005; skyUniforms['mieDirectionalG'].value = 0.8;
        
        function updateSun() {
            sun.setFromSphericalCoords(1, THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(88), THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(180));
            sky.material.uniforms['sunPosition'].value.copy(sun); water.material.uniforms['sunDirection'].value.copy(sun).normalize();
        }
        updateSun();

        const camVars = { y: 5, z: 25, lookY: 0 };
        let isInteractiveMode = false;

        function updateBg(time) {
            torusKnot.rotation.y = time * 0.1; torusKnot.rotation.x = time * 0.05;
            const lights = lightingUniformsGroup.uniforms[0];
            for (let i = 0; i < lights.length; i++) {
                const light = lights[i]; const center = lightCenters[i]; const angle = 0.8 * time + i * 0.5;
                light.value.set(center.x + Math.sin(angle) * 6, -6, center.z + Math.cos(angle) * 6, 0); 
            }
            water.material.uniforms['time'].value += 1.0 / 60.0;

            if (!isInteractiveMode) {
                cameraBg.position.y = THREE.MathUtils.lerp(cameraBg.position.y, camVars.y, 0.1);
                cameraBg.position.z = THREE.MathUtils.lerp(cameraBg.position.z, camVars.z, 0.1);
                cameraBg.position.x = Math.sin(time * 0.3) * (camVars.y < -1000 ? 5 : 2); 
                controlsBg.target.set(0, camVars.lookY, 0);
            }
            controlsBg.update(); rendererBg.render(sceneBg, cameraBg);
        }

        /* ==========================================
           2. SEPARATE GLOBE SCENE LOGIC (optimized for mobile)
        ========================================== */
        const globeCont = document.getElementById('globe-canvas-container');
        const rendererGlobe = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ alpha: true, antialias: true });
        rendererGlobe.setSize(globeCont.clientWidth, globeCont.clientHeight);
        rendererGlobe.setPixelRatio(isMobile ? 1 : Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 1.5));
        globeCont.appendChild(rendererGlobe.domElement);

        const sceneGlobe = new THREE.Scene();
        const cameraGlobe = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(45, globeCont.clientWidth / globeCont.clientHeight, 0.1, 100);
        cameraGlobe.position.z = 16;

        const controlsGlobe = new OrbitControls(cameraGlobe, rendererGlobe.domElement);
        controlsGlobe.enableDamping = true; controlsGlobe.dampingFactor = 0.05;
        controlsGlobe.autoRotate = true; controlsGlobe.autoRotateSpeed = 1.0;
        controlsGlobe.enableZoom = false; controlsGlobe.enablePan = false;

        const starCount = isMobile ? 100 : 500;
        const starGeo = new THREE.BufferGeometry();
        const starPos = new Float32Array(starCount * 3);
        for(let i=0; i<starCount*3; i++) starPos[i] = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 40;
        starGeo.setAttribute('position', new THREE.BufferAttribute(starPos, 3));
        sceneGlobe.add(new THREE.Points(starGeo, new THREE.PointsMaterial({color: 0xaaaaaa, size: 0.05})));

        sceneGlobe.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.5)); 
        const gDirLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 2.0); 
        gDirLight.position.set(10, 5, 10); sceneGlobe.add(gDirLight);
        const gBackLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(currAccentHex, 1.0); 
        gBackLight.position.set(-10, 0, -10); sceneGlobe.add(gBackLight);

        const earthMap = textureLoader.load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/r160/examples/textures/planets/earth_atmos_2048.jpg'); earthMap.colorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace; 
        const earthSpec = textureLoader.load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/r160/examples/textures/planets/earth_specular_2048.jpg');
        const earthNormal = textureLoader.load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/r160/examples/textures/planets/earth_normal_2048.jpg');
        const cloudMap = textureLoader.load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/r160/examples/textures/planets/earth_clouds_1024.png'); cloudMap.colorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace;
        const moonMap = textureLoader.load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/r160/examples/textures/planets/moon_1024.jpg'); moonMap.colorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace;

        const globeRadius = 5.5;
        const earthGeo = new THREE.SphereGeometry(globeRadius, isMobile ? 32 : 48, isMobile ? 24 : 32);
        const earthMat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
            map: earthMap, specularMap: earthSpec, normalMap: earthNormal,
            specular: new THREE.Color(0x7c7c7c), shininess: 15, normalScale: new THREE.Vector2(0.85, -0.85) 
        });
        const earth = new THREE.Mesh(earthGeo, earthMat);
        sceneGlobe.add(earth);

        const cloudMesh = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(globeRadius + 0.05, isMobile ? 32 : 48, isMobile ? 24 : 32), new THREE.MeshLambertMaterial({
            map: cloudMap, transparent: true, opacity: 0.8, blending: THREE.NormalBlending, depthWrite: false
        }));
        earth.add(cloudMesh);

        const moon = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(globeRadius * 0.25, isMobile ? 16 : 24, isMobile ? 12 : 16), new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ map: moonMap }));
        sceneGlobe.add(moon);

        function calcPosFromLatLonRad(lat, lon, radius) {
            const phi = (90 - lat) * (Math.PI / 180); const theta = (lon + 180) * (Math.PI / 180);
            return new THREE.Vector3(-(radius * Math.sin(phi) * Math.cos(theta)), radius * Math.cos(phi), radius * Math.sin(phi) * Math.sin(theta));
        }

        const baseLocs = [
            { name: "New York", client: "Apex Finance Hub", review: "Incredible growth! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: 40.71, lon: -74.00 },
            { name: "London", client: "Global Dynamics", review: "Brilliant design! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: 51.50, lon: -0.12 },
            { name: "Mumbai", client: "Reliance AI", review: "बहुत बढ़िया काम! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: 19.07, lon: 72.87 },
            { name: "Tokyo", client: "Nippon Systems", review: "素晴らしい仕事! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: 35.67, lon: 139.65 },
            { name: "Sydney", client: "Ocean Architecture", review: "Mate, it's perfect. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: -33.86, lon: 151.20 },
            { name: "Dubai", client: "Desert Sun Web", review: "عمل उत्कृष्ट! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: 25.20, lon: 55.27 },
            { name: "Berlin", client: "Euro Data Corp", review: "Perfekte Leistung! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: 52.52, lon: 13.40 },
            { name: "Paris", client: "Lumière Tech", review: "C'est magnifique! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: 48.85, lon: 2.35 },
            { name: "Toronto", client: "Maple Leaf Web", review: "Top notch quality. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: 43.65, lon: -79.38 },
            { name: "Seoul", client: "K-Tech Innovations", review: "최고의 웹사이트! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: 37.56, lon: 126.97 },
            { name: "Sao Paulo", client: "Amazonas Digital", review: "Excelente trabalho! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: -23.55, lon: -46.63 },
            { name: "Cape Town", client: "Southern Digital", review: "Amazing speed! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐", lat: -33.92, lon: 18.42 }
        ];

        const nodeMatGlobe = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: currTechHex });
        const interactableNodes = [];

        for (let i = 0; i < 66; i++) {
            const base = baseLocs[i % baseLocs.length];
            const latOffset = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10;
            const lonOffset = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 10;
            
            const nodeData = {
                name: base.name,
                client: base.client + (i > baseLocs.length ? ` ${i}` : ''),
                review: base.review,
                lat: base.lat + latOffset,
                lon: base.lon + lonOffset
            };

            const node = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.08, isMobile ? 6 : 8, isMobile ? 6 : 8), nodeMatGlobe.clone());
            node.position.copy(calcPosFromLatLonRad(nodeData.lat, nodeData.lon, globeRadius + 0.06));
            node.userData = nodeData;
            
            const halo = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.2, isMobile ? 6 : 8, isMobile ? 6 : 8), new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: currTechHex, transparent: true, opacity: 0.3, depthWrite: false }));
            node.add(halo); earth.add(node); interactableNodes.push(node); 
        }

        const rayGlobe = new THREE.Raycaster(); const mouseGlobe = new THREE.Vector2();
        const tooltip = document.getElementById('globe-tooltip'), ttCity = document.getElementById('tt-city'), ttClient = document.getElementById('tt-client'), ttReview = document.getElementById('tt-review');

        globeCont.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
            const rect = globeCont.getBoundingClientRect();
            mouseGlobe.x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1; mouseGlobe.y = -((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1;
            
            rayGlobe.setFromCamera(mouseGlobe, cameraGlobe);
            const intersects = rayGlobe.intersectObjects(interactableNodes, false); 

            if(intersects.length > 0) {
                const obj = intersects[0].object;
                tooltip.classList.remove('tooltip-hidden'); tooltip.classList.add('tooltip-visible');
                ttCity.textContent = obj.userData.name; ttClient.textContent = obj.userData.client; ttReview.textContent = obj.userData.review;
                tooltip.style.left = e.clientX + 'px'; tooltip.style.top = e.clientY + 'px';
                globeCont.style.cursor = 'pointer';
                if (obj.material) obj.material.color.setHex(currAccentHex);
                if (obj.children[0] && obj.children[0].material) obj.children[0].material.color.setHex(currAccentHex);
                controlsGlobe.autoRotate = false;
            } else {
                tooltip.classList.remove('tooltip-visible'); tooltip.classList.add('tooltip-hidden');
                globeCont.style.cursor = 'grab'; controlsGlobe.autoRotate = true;
                interactableNodes.forEach(n => {
                    if (n.material) n.material.color.setHex(currTechHex);
                    if(n.children[0] && n.children[0].material) n.children[0].material.color.setHex(currTechHex);
                });
            }
        });
        globeCont.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
            tooltip.classList.remove('tooltip-visible'); tooltip.classList.add('tooltip-hidden'); controlsGlobe.autoRotate = true;
            interactableNodes.forEach(n => { 
                if (n.material) n.material.color.setHex(currTechHex); 
                if(n.children[0] && n.children[0].material) n.children[0].material.color.setHex(currTechHex); 
            });
        });

        function updateGlobe(time) {
            controlsGlobe.update();
            cloudMesh.rotation.y += 0.0005;
            moon.position.x = Math.sin(time * 0.5) * (globeRadius * 1.5);
            moon.position.z = Math.cos(time * 0.5) * (globeRadius * 1.5);
            moon.rotation.y = time * 0.1;
            interactableNodes.forEach(n => { if (n.children[0]) n.children[0].scale.setScalar(1 + Math.sin(time * 4) * 0.2); });
            rendererGlobe.render(sceneGlobe, cameraGlobe);
        }

        /* ==========================================
           3. SEPARATE DECALS SCENE LOGIC (unchanged)
        ========================================== */
        const decalCont = document.getElementById('decal-canvas-container');
        const rendererDecal = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({ alpha: true, antialias: true });
        rendererDecal.setSize(decalCont.clientWidth, decalCont.clientHeight);
        rendererDecal.setPixelRatio(isMobile ? 1 : Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio, 1.5));
        decalCont.appendChild(rendererDecal.domElement);

        const sceneDecal = new THREE.Scene();
        const cameraDecal = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(45, decalCont.clientWidth / decalCont.clientHeight, 1, 1000);
        cameraDecal.position.z = 120;

        const controlsDecal = new OrbitControls(cameraDecal, rendererDecal.domElement);
        controlsDecal.minDistance = 50; controlsDecal.maxDistance = 200; controlsDecal.enablePan = false;

        sceneDecal.add(new THREE.AmbientLight(0x404060));
        
        const lightColors = [0xff3366, 0x33ff99, 0x66aaff, 0xffaa00, 0xaa44ff];
        const rotatingLights = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
            const color = lightColors[i % lightColors.length];
            const light = new THREE.PointLight(color, 1.5, 50);
            light.castShadow = false;
            sceneDecal.add(light);
            rotatingLights.push(light);
        }

        const dLight1 = new THREE.DirectionalLight(currAccentHex, 0.8); 
        dLight1.position.set(1, 0.75, 0.5); 
        sceneDecal.add(dLight1);
        const dLight2 = new THREE.DirectionalLight(currTechHex, 0.8); 
        dLight2.position.set(-1, 0.75, -0.5); 
        sceneDecal.add(dLight2);

        let headMesh;
        const rayDecal = new THREE.Raycaster();
        const mouseDecal = new THREE.Vector2();
        const decalsArray = []; 

        const mapD = textureLoader.load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/r160/examples/models/gltf/LeePerrySmith/Map-COL.jpg'); mapD.colorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace;
        const specD = textureLoader.load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/r160/examples/models/gltf/LeePerrySmith/Map-SPEC.jpg');
        const normD = textureLoader.load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/r160/examples/models/gltf/LeePerrySmith/Infinite-Level_02_Tangent_SmoothUV.jpg');

        new GLTFLoader().load('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/r160/examples/models/gltf/LeePerrySmith/LeePerrySmith.glb', (gltf) => {
            headMesh = gltf.scene.children[0];
            headMesh.material = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({
                color: 0xeeeeee, specular: 0x111111, map: mapD, specularMap: specD, normalMap: normD, shininess: 25
            });
            sceneDecal.add(headMesh);
            headMesh.scale.multiplyScalar(10);
        });

        const decalWords = ['SEO', 'MARKETING', 'WEB', 'GLOBAL', 'AI', 'SCALE', 'SPEED', 'DATA'];
        
        function createTextTexture() {
            const c = document.createElement('canvas'); c.width = 512; c.height = 256; const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
            const word = decalWords[Math.floor(Math.random() * decalWords.length)];
            const colorStr = '#' + new THREE.Color(Math.random() > 0.5 ? currAccentHex : currTechHex).getHexString();
            ctx.fillStyle = colorStr; ctx.font = '900 80px "Plus Jakarta Sans", sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
            ctx.shadowColor = colorStr; ctx.shadowBlur = 15; ctx.fillText(word, 256, 128);
            const tex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(c); tex.colorSpace = THREE.SRGBColorSpace;
            return tex;
        }

        let decalMoved = false;
        controlsDecal.addEventListener('change', () => decalMoved = true);
        decalCont.addEventListener('pointerdown', () => decalMoved = false);
        decalCont.addEventListener('pointerup', (e) => {
            if (!decalMoved && headMesh) {
                const rect = decalCont.getBoundingClientRect();
                mouseDecal.x = ((e.clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1; mouseDecal.y = -((e.clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1;
                rayDecal.setFromCamera(mouseDecal, cameraDecal);
                const intersects = rayDecal.intersectObject(headMesh, false);
                if (intersects.length > 0) {
                    const hit = intersects[0]; const position = hit.point.clone();
                    const dummy = new THREE.Object3D(); dummy.position.copy(position); dummy.lookAt(hit.point.clone().add(hit.face.normal));
                    const orientation = dummy.rotation; orientation.z = Math.random() * 2 * Math.PI;
                    const s = 15 + Math.random() * 10; const size = new THREE.Vector3(s, s, s);
                    const mat = new THREE.MeshPhongMaterial({ map: createTextTexture(), transparent: true, depthTest: true, depthWrite: false, polygonOffset: true, polygonOffsetFactor: -4 });
                    const decalMesh = new THREE.Mesh(new DecalGeometry(headMesh, position, orientation, size), mat);
                    headMesh.attach(decalMesh);
                    decalsArray.push(decalMesh);
                }
            }
        });

        document.getElementById('reset-decals').addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (headMesh) {
                decalsArray.forEach(d => headMesh.remove(d));
                decalsArray.length = 0; 
            }
        });

        function updateDecal(time) {
            if (rotatingLights.length) {
                const radius = 40;
                const speed = 0.5;
                rotatingLights.forEach((light, index) => {
                    const angle = time * speed + index * Math.PI / 2;
                    light.position.x = Math.sin(angle) * radius;
                    light.position.z = Math.cos(angle) * radius;
                    light.position.y = 20 + Math.sin(angle * 1.3) * 15;
                    light.intensity = 1.2 + Math.sin(time * 3 + index) * 0.5;
                });
            }
            controlsDecal.update();
            rendererDecal.render(sceneDecal, cameraDecal);
        }

        /* ==========================================
           THEME SWITCHING LOGIC
        ========================================== */
        window.addEventListener('themeChanged', (e) => {
            const theme = e.detail;
            if(theme === 'dark') { currAccentHex = 0xE5B769; currTechHex = 0x00F0FF; currBgHex = 0x020203; }
            if(theme === 'rich') { currAccentHex = 0xd4af37; currTechHex = 0xff2a6d; currBgHex = 0x1a0b2e; }
            if(theme === 'sunny') { currAccentHex = 0xf59e0b; currTechHex = 0x0284c7; currBgHex = 0xe0f2fe; }

            if(knotMat) knotMat.color.setHex(currAccentHex);
            if(water) {
                water.material.uniforms.sunColor.value.setHex(currAccentHex);
                water.material.uniforms.waterColor.value.setHex(currBgHex);
            }
            for (let i = 0; i < pointLightsMax; i++) {
                const col = new THREE.Color(i % 2 === 0 ? currTechHex : currAccentHex).toArray();
                lightColorsData[i].value.set(col[0], col[1], col[2], 0);
            }
            if(gBackLight) gBackLight.color.setHex(currAccentHex);
            nodeMatGlobe.color.setHex(currTechHex);
            interactableNodes.forEach(n => {
                n.material.color.setHex(currTechHex);
                if(n.children[0]) n.children[0].material.color.setHex(currTechHex);
            });
            if(dLight1) dLight1.color.setHex(currAccentHex);
            if(dLight2) dLight2.color.setHex(currTechHex);
        });

        /* ==========================================
           4. MASTER ANIMATION LOOP & RESIZE
        ========================================== */
        window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
            windowHalfX = window.innerWidth / 2;
            cameraText.aspect = textCont.clientWidth / textCont.clientHeight; cameraText.updateProjectionMatrix(); rendererText.setSize(textCont.clientWidth, textCont.clientHeight);
            cameraBg.aspect = window.innerWidth / window.innerHeight; cameraBg.updateProjectionMatrix(); rendererBg.setSize(window.innerWidth, window.innerHeight);
            if(globeCont.clientWidth) { cameraGlobe.aspect = globeCont.clientWidth / globeCont.clientHeight; cameraGlobe.updateProjectionMatrix(); rendererGlobe.setSize(globeCont.clientWidth, globeCont.clientHeight); }
            if(decalCont.clientWidth) { cameraDecal.aspect = decalCont.clientWidth / decalCont.clientHeight; cameraDecal.updateProjectionMatrix(); rendererDecal.setSize(decalCont.clientWidth, decalCont.clientHeight); }
        });

        function masterLoop() {
            requestAnimationFrame(masterLoop);
            const time = globalClock.getElapsedTime();
            updateTextScene(time);
            updateBg(time);
            updateGlobe(time);
            updateDecal(time);
        }
        masterLoop(); 

        /* ==========================================
           5. UI BUTTONS & GSAP SCROLL LOGIC
        ========================================== */
        const uiLayer = document.getElementById('ui-layer'), exploreBtn = document.getElementById('explore-btn'), exitBtn = document.getElementById('exit-interactive');
        exploreBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            isInteractiveMode = true;
            uiLayer.classList.add('hidden-ui');
            exitBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
            gsap.to(cameraBg.position, { x: 0, y: 8, z: 30, duration: 2, ease: "power3.inOut" });
            gsap.to(cameraBg, { duration: 2, onComplete: () => {
                controlsBg.autoRotate = true;
                controlsBg.enableZoom = true;
                controlsBg.enablePan = true;
                controlsBg.maxPolarAngle = Math.PI / 2;
            }});
        });
        exitBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            isInteractiveMode = false;
            uiLayer.classList.remove('hidden-ui');
            exitBtn.classList.add('hidden');
            controlsBg.autoRotate = false;
            controlsBg.enableZoom = false;
            controlsBg.enablePan = false;
            camVars.y = 5; camVars.z = 25; camVars.lookY = 0;
            gsap.to(cameraBg.position, { x: 0, y: camVars.y, z: camVars.z, duration: 1 });
            gsap.to(controlsBg.target, { y: camVars.lookY, duration: 1 });
        });

        gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);
        gsap.fromTo(".gsap-hero", { y: 30, opacity: 0 }, { y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 1, stagger: 0.1, ease: "power2.out" });
        gsap.utils.toArray('.gsap-reveal').forEach(el => { gsap.fromTo(el, { y: 40, opacity: 0 }, { scrollTrigger: { trigger: el, start: "top 85%" }, y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 1, ease: "power2.out" }); });
        gsap.fromTo(".gsap-card", { y: 50, opacity: 0 }, { scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#architectures", start: "top 70%" }, y: 0, opacity: 1, duration: 1, stagger: 0.2 });

        gsap.to(camVars, {
            y: -1990, z: 80, lookY: -1990, ease: "power2.inOut",
            scrollTrigger: { trigger: "#testimonials", start: "top center", endTrigger: "#ocean-view", end: "bottom bottom", scrub: true,
                onUpdate: () => { 
                    rendererBg.toneMappingExposure = camVars.y < -1000 ? 1.5 : 1.0; 
                    const ov = document.getElementById('ocean-view');
                    if(camVars.y < -1900) ov.classList.remove('opacity-0'); else ov.classList.add('opacity-0');
                }
            }
        });

        /* ==========================================
           6. LIQUID TILT & MARQUEE GENERATOR
        ========================================== */
        const fNames = ["Alex", "Priya", "James", "Elena", "Vikram", "Sarah", "Rahul", "Emma", "Neha", "Michael"];
        const lNames = ["M.", "Sharma", "K.", "Rodriguez", "S.", "Chen", "Verma", "L.", "Patel", "B."];
        const companies = ["TechCorp", "InnovateX", "Global Dynamics", "Apex Solutions", "Quantum AI"];
        const reviews = ["Incredible design.", "Flawless execution.", "Highest converting site ever.", "Impenetrable security.", "A digital masterpiece."];

        const cardsHTML = [];
        for(let i=0; i<50; i++) {
            const name = fNames[Math.floor(Math.random()*fNames.length)] + " " + lNames[Math.floor(Math.random()*lNames.length)];
            const company = companies[Math.floor(Math.random()*companies.length)];
            const review = reviews[Math.floor(Math.random()*reviews.length)];
            cardsHTML.push(`<div class="tilt-wrapper testimonial-item interactive-ui"><div class="rgb-card"><div class="rgb-content"><div class="flex items-center gap-1 mb-3">${'<i data-lucide="star" class="w-3 h-3 text-accent fill-accent"></i>'.repeat(5)}</div><p class="text-xs text-textmuted font-light italic leading-relaxed flex-1">"${review}"</p><div class="mt-4 border-t border-textmain/10 pt-3"><h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-textmain">${name}</h4><p class="text-[9px] text-textmuted uppercase tracking-widest">${company}</p></div></div></div></div>`);
        }
        const finalCard = `<div class="tilt-wrapper testimonial-item flex items-center justify-center interactive-ui"><div class="rgb-card !border-accent/30"><div class="rgb-content items-center justify-center text-center"><h3 class="text-4xl font-serif text-textmain mb-2">+2338</h3><p class="text-[10px] text-accent font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]">More verified clients</p></div></div></div>`;

        document.getElementById('testimonial-track-1').innerHTML = cardsHTML.slice(0, 25).join('').repeat(2);
        document.getElementById('testimonial-track-2').innerHTML = (cardsHTML.slice(25, 50).join('') + finalCard).repeat(2);
        lucide.createIcons();

        setTimeout(() => {
            document.querySelectorAll('.rgb-card').forEach(card => {
                const content = card.querySelector('.rgb-content');
                card.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
                    const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect(); const x = e.clientX - rect.left; const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
                    card.style.transform = `rotateX(${(((y - (rect.height / 2)) / (rect.height / 2)) * -10).toFixed(2)}deg) rotateY(${(((x - (rect.width / 2)) / (rect.width / 2)) * 10).toFixed(2)}deg) scale3d(1.02, 1.02, 1.02)`;
                    card.style.zIndex = "50"; content.style.backgroundImage = `radial-gradient(circle at ${x}px ${y}px, rgba(255,255,255,0.15), rgba(255,255,255,0.02) 40%, transparent 70%)`;
                });
                card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
                    card.style.transform = 'rotateX(0) rotateY(0) scale3d(1, 1, 1)'; card.style.zIndex = "1"; content.style.backgroundImage = `radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.05), transparent 70%)`;
                });
            });
        }, 500);

        /* ==========================================
           7. WEB3FORMS FORM SUBMISSION (replaces Google Sheets)
        ========================================== */
        const form = document.getElementById('leadForm');
        form.addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const btn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
            const txt = document.getElementById('btnText');
            const ico = document.getElementById('btnIcon');
            const status = document.getElementById('formStatus');
            
            btn.disabled = true;
            txt.innerText = "Sending...";
            ico.setAttribute('data-lucide', 'loader-2');
            ico.classList.add('animate-spin');
            lucide.createIcons();
            status.classList.add('hidden');

            // Prepare form data
            const formData = new FormData(form);
            const data = Object.fromEntries(formData.entries());

            try {
                const response = await fetch('https://api.web3forms.com/submit', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                        'Accept': 'application/json'
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify(data)
                });

                const result = await response.json();
                if (result.success) {
                    txt.innerText = "Message Sent";
                    status.innerText = "Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.";
                    status.className = "mb-8 p-4 rounded-lg text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-center border border-green-500/30 text-green-400 bg-green-500/10 block";
                    form.reset();
                } else {
                    throw new Error(result.message || 'Submission failed');
                }
            } catch (error) {
                status.innerText = "Network Error Occurred.";
                status.className = "mb-8 p-4 rounded-lg text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest font-bold text-center border border-red-500/30 text-red-400 bg-red-500/10 block";
            } finally {
                btn.disabled = false;
                txt.innerText = "Transmit Data";
                ico.setAttribute('data-lucide', 'send');
                ico.classList.remove('animate-spin');
                lucide.createIcons();
            }
        });
    </script>
</body>
    </html>

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
SIDDHI AI - Automated Blog Generator (zai-sdk)
Generates unique, SEO-optimized articles daily on diverse topics.
"""

import os
import random
import datetime
import re
import requests
import logging
import sys
import time
from string import punctuation
from typing import List, Tuple, Optional

# Correct SDK for Zhipu
try:
    from zai import ZhipuAiClient
except ImportError:
    print("Please install zai-sdk: pip install zai-sdk")
    sys.exit(1)

# -------------------- CONFIGURATION --------------------
SITE_URL = "https://siddhiai-welcome.vercel.app"
BLOG_DIR = "blog"
POSTS_DIR = os.path.join(BLOG_DIR, "posts")
INDEX_FILE = os.path.join(BLOG_DIR, "index.html")
LOG_FILE = "blog_generator.log"
INDEX_HTML_PATH = "index.html"          # to extract hidden keywords

# Zhipu API settings
ZHIPU_MODEL = "glm-5"                    # or "glm-4" if needed
MAX_TOKENS = 65536
TEMPERATURE = 0.7
REQUEST_TIMEOUT = 30
MAX_RETRIES = 3
RETRY_DELAY = 2

# Logging
logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.INFO,
    format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s',
    handlers=[
        logging.FileHandler(LOG_FILE, encoding='utf-8'),
        logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)
    ]
)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

# -------------------- EXPANDED TOPIC CATEGORIES --------------------
# These are the services/keywords you want to cover.
# The script will pick one at random each day.
TOPICS = [
    # Core services
    "Python Training", "Digital Marketing", "SEO Services", "Web Development",
    "AI Solutions", "E-commerce Website", "Content Marketing", "Social Media Marketing",
    "Stock Market Analysis", "Mobile App Development", "Cloud Consulting", "3D Web Design",
    # Local business
    "Local SEO", "Small Business Websites", "Google My Business Optimization",
    # Technology trends
    "AI in Business", "Machine Learning Applications", "Cybersecurity Basics",
    "DevOps Practices", "Web Performance Optimization", "Progressive Web Apps",
    # Career & learning
    "Python Career Guide", "Data Science with Python", "Freelancing Tips",
    "Remote Work Tools", "Tech Certifications",
    # Corporate & news
    "TCS Hiring Updates", "ISL 2026 News", "Gemini AI Features", "Stock Market Trends",
    # How‑to
    "How to Build a Website", "How to Start a Blog", "How to Use Google Colab"
]

# -------------------- LOCATION DATA --------------------
GLOBAL_LOCATIONS = ["United States", "Canada", "United Kingdom", "Australia", "New Zealand", "Ireland"]
COUNTRY = "India"
STATES = {
    "Madhya Pradesh": ["Indore", "Bhopal", "Gwalior", "Jabalpur", "Ujjain"],
    "Karnataka": ["Bangalore", "Mysore", "Hubli", "Mangalore", "Belgaum"]
}
AREAS = {
    "Indore": ["Vijay Nagar", "New Palasia", "Scheme No. 78", "Rajendra Nagar", "Bholaram"],
    "Bangalore": ["Indiranagar", "Whitefield", "Koramangala", "HSR Layout", "Jayanagar"]
}

# -------------------- UTILITY FUNCTIONS --------------------
def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    text = text.lower().replace(" ", "-")
    text = re.sub(rf"[{re.escape(punctuation)}]", "", text)
    text = re.sub(r"-+", "-", text)
    return text.strip("-")

def safe_read_file(filepath: str) -> Optional[str]:
    try:
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            return f.read()
    except FileNotFoundError:
        logger.warning(f"File not found: {filepath}")
        return None
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error reading {filepath}: {e}")
        return None

def safe_write_file(filepath: str, content: str) -> bool:
    try:
        os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(filepath), exist_ok=True)
        with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            f.write(content)
        logger.info(f"✅ Wrote {filepath}")
        return True
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error writing {filepath}: {e}")
        return False

# -------------------- KEYWORD EXTRACTION (from index.html) --------------------
def extract_keywords_from_index() -> List[str]:
    content = safe_read_file(INDEX_HTML_PATH)
    if not content:
        logger.warning("index.html not found; using default keywords.")
        return []
    pattern = r'<div style="display:none;">(.*?)</div>'
    match = re.search(pattern, content, re.DOTALL)
    if not match:
        return []
    keywords_text = match.group(1)
    keywords = [kw.strip() for kw in keywords_text.split(',') if kw.strip()]
    seen = set()
    unique = []
    for kw in keywords:
        if kw not in seen:
            seen.add(kw)
            unique.append(kw)
    logger.info(f"Extracted {len(unique)} keywords from index.html")
    return unique

# These are used to enrich content, not as primary topics.
MASTER_KEYWORDS = extract_keywords_from_index() or [
    "learn python", "digital marketing", "web development", "SEO", "AI"
]

# -------------------- LOCATION SELECTION --------------------
def select_location() -> Tuple[str, str]:
    levels = ['global', 'country', 'state', 'city', 'area']
    weights = [0.1, 0.2, 0.2, 0.3, 0.2]
    level = random.choices(levels, weights=weights)[0]
    if level == 'global':
        return random.choice(GLOBAL_LOCATIONS), "global"
    elif level == 'country':
        return COUNTRY, "country"
    elif level == 'state':
        state = random.choice(list(STATES.keys()))
        return state, "state"
    elif level == 'city':
        state = random.choice(list(STATES.keys()))
        city = random.choice(STATES[state])
        return f"{city}, {state}", "city"
    else:  # area
        city = random.choice(list(AREAS.keys()))
        area = random.choice(AREAS[city])
        return f"{area}, {city}", "area"

# -------------------- ZHIPU AI CLIENT --------------------
def init_zhipu_client() -> Optional[ZhipuAiClient]:
    api_key = os.environ.get("ZHIPU_API_KEY")
    if not api_key:
        logger.error("ZHIPU_API_KEY environment variable not set")
        return None
    try:
        client = ZhipuAiClient(api_key=api_key)
        logger.info("✅ ZhipuAiClient initialized")
        return client
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Client init failed: {e}")
        return None

def generate_content_with_zhipu(prompt: str, max_tokens: int = MAX_TOKENS) -> Optional[str]:
    client = init_zhipu_client()
    if not client:
        return None

    for attempt in range(MAX_RETRIES):
        try:
            logger.info(f"Generating content (attempt {attempt+1})...")
            response = client.chat.completions.create(
                model=ZHIPU_MODEL,
                messages=[
                    {"role": "system", "content": "You are an expert SEO content writer for SIDDHI AI, a premier digital marketing and web development agency. Write in a professional, informative, and engaging style. Use proper HTML formatting with h2, h3, p, ul, li tags. Include relevant keywords naturally. Make content unique, valuable, and actionable."},
                    {"role": "user", "content": prompt}
                ],
                thinking={"type": "enabled"},
                max_tokens=max_tokens,
                temperature=TEMPERATURE
            )
            content = response.choices[0].message.content
            logger.info(f"✅ Generated {len(content)} chars")
            return content
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Zhipu API error: {e}")
            if attempt < MAX_RETRIES - 1:
                time.sleep(RETRY_DELAY * (2 ** attempt))
    return None

def generate_fallback_content(primary_kw: str, location: str) -> str:
    """Fallback template in case API fails."""
    year = datetime.datetime.now().year
    return f"""
<h2>Introduction to {primary_kw} in {location}</h2>
<p>Are you looking for professional <strong>{primary_kw} services in {location}</strong>? SIDDHI AI is your trusted partner for high-quality {primary_kw} solutions tailored to the {location} market. With our expertise and proven track record, we help businesses achieve their digital goals efficiently.</p>

<h2>Why Choose SIDDHI AI for {primary_kw} in {location}</h2>
<ul>
    <li><strong>Local Expertise:</strong> Deep understanding of {location}'s business landscape</li>
    <li><strong>Customized Solutions:</strong> Tailored strategies for your specific needs</li>
    <li><strong>Proven Results:</strong> Track record of successful projects in {location}</li>
    <li><strong>Competitive Pricing:</strong> Affordable packages without compromising quality</li>
    <li><strong>24/7 Support:</strong> Dedicated assistance from our expert team</li>
</ul>

<h2>Our {primary_kw} Services in {location}</h2>
<p>SIDDHI AI offers comprehensive {primary_kw} solutions designed for businesses in {location}. From strategy development to implementation and ongoing support, we provide end-to-end services that drive real results.</p>

<h2>Success Stories in {location}</h2>
<p>We've helped numerous clients in {location} transform their digital presence through our {primary_kw} expertise. Contact us to learn how we can help your business succeed.</p>

<div class="text-center my-12">
    <a href="/#contact" class="btn-creepy inline-flex bg-accent text-obsidian px-8 py-4 rounded-full">Get Free Consultation</a>
</div>
"""

# -------------------- ARTICLE GENERATION --------------------
def generate_article(primary_kw: str, location: str) -> Tuple[str, str, str]:
    year = datetime.datetime.now().year
    current_date = datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%B %d, %Y")

    # Title variations
    titles = [
        f"Best {primary_kw} in {location} – {year} Complete Guide",
        f"Top {primary_kw} Services in {location}: {year} Review",
        f"How to Choose the Right {primary_kw} in {location} ({year})",
        f"{primary_kw} in {location}: Expert Tips & Strategies for {year}",
        f"The Ultimate Guide to {primary_kw} in {location} ({year})"
    ]
    title = random.choice(titles)
    meta_description = f"Looking for expert {primary_kw} in {location}? SIDDHI AI provides top-rated {primary_kw.lower()} solutions. Free consultation! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐"

    # Build a highly explicit prompt
    prompt = f"""
You are an expert SEO content writer for SIDDHI AI, a premier digital marketing and web development agency headquartered in Madhya Pradesh, India.

Your task: Write a comprehensive, 1200‑1500 word blog article about **{primary_kw} in {location}** for the SIDDHI AI website.

The article must be factual, helpful, and focused on the specific location: **{location}**. Do not confuse this location with any other place.

## Article Structure (use HTML tags exactly as shown):
<h2>Introduction to {primary_kw} in {location}</h2>
<p>... (2-3 paragraphs introducing the topic and SIDDHI AI's expertise in this location) ...</p>

<h2>Why {location} is a Prime Destination for {primary_kw}</h2>

- Include relevant local landmarks, neighborhoods, or business districts in {location} where appropriate.
- The primary keyword is "{primary_kw} in {location}". Use it naturally 3-4 times.
- Ensure all information is accurate for {location}. Do not mix in details from other cities.
- The tone should be professional yet approachable, reflecting SIDDHI AI's brand.

Generate the complete article content with proper HTML formatting.
"""

    # Try AI generation
    body_content = generate_content_with_zhipu(prompt, max_tokens=MAX_TOKENS)
    if not body_content:
        logger.warning("Using fallback content")
        body_content = generate_fallback_content(primary_kw, location)

    # Add related posts section
    related = generate_related_posts(f"{slugify(primary_kw)}-{slugify(location)}.html")

    # Complete HTML template with your existing design
    html = f"""<!DOCTYPE html>

        :root {{--bg-rgb: 2,2,3;--accent-rgb:229,183,105;--tech-rgb:0,240,255;--text-rgb:229,231,235;--text-muted-rgb:156,163,175;--card-bg:rgba(8,8,10,0.75);}}

        .blog-content li {{padding: 0.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(var(--text-muted-rgb), 0.1);}}

                    <span>Published on {current_date}</span>
                    <span>•</span>
                    <span>By SIDDHI AI Team</span>

    </footer>
    <script>lucide.createIcons();</script>
</body>
</html>"""
    return html, title, meta_description

def generate_related_posts(current_post_filename: str) -> str:
    posts = []
    if os.path.exists(POSTS_DIR):
        all_posts = [f for f in os.listdir(POSTS_DIR) if f.endswith('.html') and f != current_post_filename]
        selected = random.sample(all_posts, min(3, len(all_posts))) if all_posts else []
        for fname in selected:
            content = safe_read_file(os.path.join(POSTS_DIR, fname))
            if content:
                title_match = re.search(r'<h1[^>]*>(.*?)</h1>', content, re.DOTALL)
                title = title_match.group(1).strip() if title_match else fname.replace('.html', '').replace('-', ' ').title()
                posts.append((title, f"/blog/posts/{fname}"))
    if not posts:
        return ""
    links = "".join(f'<li><a href="{url}" class="hover:text-accent transition-colors">{title}</a></li>' for title, url in posts)
    return f"""
<div class="mt-16 pt-8 border-t border-textmain/10">
    <h3 class="text-2xl font-serif mb-6">Related Articles</h3>
    <ul class="space-y-2">{links}</ul>
</div>"""

# -------------------- BLOG INDEX GENERATION --------------------
def generate_blog_index() -> str:
    posts = []
    if not os.path.exists(POSTS_DIR):
        os.makedirs(POSTS_DIR, exist_ok=True)
    for fname in sorted(os.listdir(POSTS_DIR), reverse=True):
        if not fname.endswith('.html'):
            continue
        content = safe_read_file(os.path.join(POSTS_DIR, fname))
        if not content:
            continue
        title_match = re.search(r'<h1[^>]*>(.*?)</h1>', content, re.DOTALL)
        title = title_match.group(1).strip() if title_match else fname.replace('.html', '').replace('-', ' ').title()
        desc_match = re.search(r'<meta name="description" content="([^"]+)"', content)
        description = desc_match.group(1) if desc_match else f"Read our guide on {title}"
        date_match = re.match(r'(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})', fname)
        date = date_match.group(1) if date_match else datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
        try:
            date_obj = datetime.datetime.strptime(date, "%Y-%m-%d")
            display_date = date_obj.strftime("%B %d, %Y")
        except:
            display_date = date
        location_match = re.search(r'in ([A-Za-z\s,]+)(?:\s*[–-]\s*\d{4}|$)', title)
        location = location_match.group(1).strip() if location_match else "Global"
        posts.append({
            'title': title,
            'description': description[:120] + "..." if len(description) > 120 else description,
            'date': display_date,
            'filename': fname,
            'location': location
        })
    cards_html = ""
    for post in posts:
        cards_html += f"""
        <div class="tilt-wrapper h-full">
            <div class="rgb-card h-full">
                <div class="rgb-content flex flex-col">
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                        <span class="text-[9px] font-bold text-accent uppercase tracking-widest">{post['location']}</span>
                        <span class="text-[9px] text-textmuted">•</span>
                        <span class="text-[9px] text-textmuted">{post['date']}</span>
                    </div>
                    <h3 class="text-xl font-bold text-textmain mb-3 line-clamp-2">{post['title']}</h3>
                    <p class="text-textmuted text-sm font-light mb-4 flex-1 line-clamp-3">{post['description']}</p>
                    <a href="/blog/posts/{post['filename']}" class="btn-creepy self-start mt-auto bg-transparent border border-accent text-accent px-6 py-2 rounded-full text-[9px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-accent hover:text-obsidian transition-all">
                        <span class="btn-text-content">Read More</span>
                        <div class="eyes-wrapper">
                            <div class="creepy-eye"><div class="creepy-pupil"></div></div>
                            <div class="creepy-eye"><div class="creepy-pupil"></div></div>
                        </div>
                    </a>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>"""
    year = datetime.datetime.now().year
    index_html = f"""<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="scroll-smooth">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>SIDDHI AI Blog - Insights & Articles</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Expert insights on Python training, digital marketing, web development, and AI solutions. SIDDHI AI's official blog with daily updates and industry trends.">
    <meta property="og:title" content="SIDDHI AI Blog">
    <meta property="og:description" content="Expert insights and daily articles from SIDDHI AI.">
    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
    <meta property="og:url" content="{SITE_URL}/blog/">
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@200;300;400;600;800&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {{--bg-rgb: 2,2,3;--accent-rgb:229,183,105;--tech-rgb:0,240,255;--text-rgb:229,231,235;--text-muted-rgb:156,163,175;--card-bg:rgba(8,8,10,0.75);}}
        [data-theme="rich"] {{--bg-rgb:26,11,46;--accent-rgb:212,175,55;--tech-rgb:255,42,109;--text-rgb:243,232,255;--text-muted-rgb:216,180,226;--card-bg:rgba(26,11,46,0.75);}}
        [data-theme="sunny"] {{--bg-rgb:224,242,254;--accent-rgb:245,158,11;--tech-rgb:2,132,199;--text-rgb:15,23,42;--text-muted-rgb:71,85,105;--card-bg:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);}}
        body {{background-color: rgb(var(--bg-rgb)); color: rgb(var(--text-rgb)); font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;}}
        .glass-panel {{background: var(--card-bg); backdrop-filter: blur(16px);}}
        .gold-gradient {{background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgb(var(--accent-rgb)) 0%, #FFF8DC 50%, rgb(var(--accent-rgb)) 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;}}
        .tilt-wrapper {{ perspective: 1200px; }}
        .rgb-card {{position: relative; background: rgb(var(--bg-rgb)); border-radius: 1.5rem; overflow: hidden; height: 100%; min-height: 320px;}}
        .rgb-card::before {{content: ''; position: absolute; top: -50%; left: -50%; width: 200%; height: 200%; background: conic-gradient(rgb(var(--tech-rgb)), rgb(var(--accent-rgb)), #FF0055, #9D00FF, rgb(var(--tech-rgb))); animation: rgbSpin 4s linear infinite; opacity: 0.3;}}
        .rgb-card:hover::before {{opacity: 1;}}
        .rgb-content {{position: absolute; inset: 2px; background: var(--card-bg); border-radius: calc(1.5rem - 2px); z-index: 10; padding: 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: calc(100% - 4px);}}
        @keyframes rgbSpin {{100% {{ transform: rotate(360deg); }}}}
        .btn-creepy {{position: relative; overflow: hidden; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;}}
        .btn-creepy .eyes-wrapper {{position: absolute; right: 1.5rem; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); display: flex; gap: 4px; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s ease; pointer-events: none;}}
        .btn-creepy:hover .eyes-wrapper {{opacity: 1;}}
        .btn-creepy:hover .btn-text-content {{transform: translateX(-15px);}}
        .line-clamp-2 {{display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;}}
        .line-clamp-3 {{display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 3; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;}}
    </style>
    <script>function changeTheme(theme){{document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', theme);}}</script>
</head>
<body>
    <nav class="fixed w-full z-50 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-textmain/10 bg-obsidian/40">
        <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 lg:px-12">
            <div class="flex justify-between items-center h-20">
                <a href="{SITE_URL}" class="flex items-center gap-3"><i data-lucide="cpu" class="text-accent w-6 h-6"></i><span class="font-extrabold text-xl tracking-tighter">SIDDHI <span class="text-accent">AI</span></span></a>
                <div class="hidden md:flex items-center space-x-6">

# -------------------- MAIN --------------------
def main():
    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("🚀 Starting SIDDHI AI Blog Generator (zai-sdk)")
    logger.info("=" * 60)

    try:
        os.makedirs(POSTS_DIR, exist_ok=True)

        # Pick a random topic from the expanded list
        primary_kw = random.choice(TOPICS)
        location, loc_type = select_location()
        logger.info(f"📝 Topic: {primary_kw}")
        logger.info(f"📍 Location: {location} ({loc_type})")

        html, title, meta = generate_article(primary_kw, location)

        date_str = datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
        base_slug = slugify(f"{primary_kw}-{location}")
        filename = f"{date_str}-{base_slug}.html"
        filepath = os.path.join(POSTS_DIR, filename)
        counter = 1
        while os.path.exists(filepath):
            name, ext = os.path.splitext(filename)
            filepath = os.path.join(POSTS_DIR, f"{name}-{counter}{ext}")
            counter += 1

        if safe_write_file(filepath, html):
            logger.info(f"✅ Article saved: {filepath}")
        else:
            logger.error("❌ Failed to save article")
            return

        index_html = generate_blog_index()
        if safe_write_file(INDEX_FILE, index_html):
            logger.info(f"✅ Blog index updated: {INDEX_FILE}")
        else:
            logger.error("❌ Failed to update blog index")
            return

        logger.info("🎉 Blog generation completed successfully!")

    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"💥 Fatal error: {e}", exc_info=True)
        sys.exit(1)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

>>>>>>> scripts/generate_sitemap.py

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Generate sitemap.xml for SIDDHI AI.
Includes homepage, policy page, blog index, and all blog posts.
"""

import os
import datetime
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from typing import List, Dict

SITE_URL = "https://siddhiai-welcome.vercel.app"
BLOG_POSTS_DIR = "blog/posts"
OUTPUT_FILE = "sitemap.xml"

STATIC_PAGES = [
    {"url": "/", "priority": "1.0", "changefreq": "weekly"},
    {"url": "/policy.html", "priority": "0.3", "changefreq": "monthly"},
    {"url": "/blog/", "priority": "0.8", "changefreq": "daily"},
]

def get_blog_post_urls() -> List[Dict]:
    urls = []
    if not os.path.exists(BLOG_POSTS_DIR):
        return urls
    for fname in os.listdir(BLOG_POSTS_DIR):
        if fname.endswith(".html"):
            filepath = os.path.join(BLOG_POSTS_DIR, fname)
            mtime = os.path.getmtime(filepath)
            lastmod = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(mtime).date().isoformat()
            urls.append({
                "url": f"/blog/posts/{fname}",
                "lastmod": lastmod,
                "priority": "0.6",
                "changefreq": "monthly"
            })
    return urls

def generate_sitemap():
    root = ET.Element("urlset", xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9")

    for page in STATIC_PAGES:
        url_elem = ET.SubElement(root, "url")
        loc = ET.SubElement(url_elem, "loc")
        loc.text = SITE_URL + page["url"]
        priority = ET.SubElement(url_elem, "priority")
        priority.text = page["priority"]
        changefreq = ET.SubElement(url_elem, "changefreq")
        changefreq.text = page["changefreq"]
        if page["url"] in ["/", "/blog/"]:
            today = datetime.date.today().isoformat()
            lastmod = ET.SubElement(url_elem, "lastmod")
            lastmod.text = today

    for post in get_blog_post_urls():
        url_elem = ET.SubElement(root, "url")
        loc = ET.SubElement(url_elem, "loc")
        loc.text = SITE_URL + post["url"]
        lastmod = ET.SubElement(url_elem, "lastmod")
        lastmod.text = post["lastmod"]
        priority = ET.SubElement(url_elem, "priority")
        priority.text = post["priority"]
        changefreq = ET.SubElement(url_elem, "changefreq")
        changefreq.text = post["changefreq"]

    tree = ET.ElementTree(root)
    tree.write(OUTPUT_FILE, encoding="utf-8", xml_declaration=True)
    print(f"✅ Sitemap generated with {len(STATIC_PAGES) + len(get_blog_post_urls())} URLs.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    generate_sitemap()
